privileged_info_summary: The task operates on the live, real-world website crawler-test.com and correctly expects output files 'social_tags_export.csv' and 'missing_social_tags.txt' as specified in the scripts. However, the test URLs claimed in the metadata ('https://crawler-test.com/facebook/has_og_tags' and 'https://crawler-test.com/facebook/no_og_tags') are completely hallucinated; they return HTTP 404 errors on the live site. A valid URL on the site that actually contains Open Graph tags is 'https://crawler-test.com/social_tags/open_graph_tags'.
